title: Rename devis - Restore Defaults returns to official device name
scenario: After renaming a device, performing "Restore Defaults" should revert the device name to its official name (e.g., "Voyager" shortened to "V").
steps: Rename the device to a custom name (e.g., 'Voyager')
expected: The device name should return to the official device name (e.g., 'V' instead of 'Voyager')
